_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identification, bias evaluation, human oversight documentation, and residual risk determination.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AG domain. Skill AG-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.485), AG-S-007 (AG, cosine: 0.478).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.469). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. NICE-only terms [handling, incidents] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessments, bias, conducting, determination, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.895, R=0.837). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Skill in handling incidents" and "Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identifi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 ≈ STS 0.469 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [skill]. NICE-only: [handling, incidents]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessments, bias, conducting, determination, documentation].
